query:
INSERT INTO system_settings (settingKey, settingValue, settingType, description) VALUES 
('system_phase', 'build', 'enum', 'Current operational phase: build, stabilize, or operations. Controls transition eligibility.'),
('transition_enabled', 'false', 'boolean', 'Whether contractor transitions are currently enabled'),
('min_tenure_manager_months', '24', 'number', 'Minimum months as employee before manager can transition'),
('min_tenure_coordinator_months', '24', 'number', 'Minimum months as employee before coordinator can transition');
command:
